articles.title: Uncle Sam is wrong, India and China are doing their bit to fight climate change
articles.summary: It is true that there is an increase in carbon emission by India and China due to homegrown consumption and lack of infrastructure. But let s keep in mind that India s carbon emissions per capita are still 10 times lower and China s is half of that compared to the US.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Multibagger railway stock drops for ninth straight session, hits over 2-year low; down 35% in 2026
articles.summary: Rail Vikas Nigam shares fell 2.5% to ₹229.70, marking nine consecutive losses. The stock's decline is attributed to disappointing Q4FY26 results, with net profit down 59% YoY, leading to a 36% year-to-date loss and one of the worst performances of 2026.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Do you know how an IPO works in India? Here's a step-by-step guide
articles.summary: A company's IPO marks its transition to a publicly traded entity, enabling capital raising through public share offerings. Governed by SEBI in India, the IPO process involves multiple stages, including regulatory approvals and share pricing, enhancing company visibility and shareholder liquidity.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Reliance Industries share price tanks for 9th day in a row, erodes ₹129,000 crore in market cap
articles.summary: Reliance Industries share price declined over 1.5% to its 52-week low of ₹1270.60 apiece in intraday deals today. During the nine-day losing run, the Mukesh Ambani-led company's shares have shed 7%, eroding investor wealth by ₹129,000 crore.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: 800% returns in five years! Multibagger stock jumps 4% despite weak trends on Dalal Street
articles.summary: Rathi Steel & Power share price has fallen over 8% in one month and has declined 28% on a YTD basis. The smallcap stock has dropped 34% in one year and has plunged over 62% in two years. However, Rathi Steel share price has delivered multibagger returns of 831% in five years.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Fractal Analytics: an AI leader, or expensive IT bet?
articles.summary: While its proprietary AI products and sticky client base set it apart from traditional IT firms, a hefty 40x valuation and high client concentration leave little room for error.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Vinay Rajani of HDFC Sec suggests Viyash Scientific, Federal Bank shares to buy in near-term
articles.summary: The Indian stock market saw heavy losses, with the BSE Sensex dropping 1.11% and Nifty 50 declining 1.22%, driven by geopolitical tensions and a global tech selloff. Rising crude oil prices raised inflation concerns, but broader indices displayed relative resilience.

articles.title: Penny stock under ₹10 hits upper circuit despite stock market sell-off
articles.summary: Penny stock under ₹10: Kshitij Polyline share price has gained over 50% in one month, and has jumped more than 160% in three months. The penny stock has surged 141% on a year-to-date (YTD) basis, while it has rallied 84% in one year.

Despite some losses in others, analysts suggest pharma stocks are resilient during market instability due to consistent healthcare demand.

articles.title: Merritronix share price hits in 5% upper circuit after a blockbuster debut
articles.summary: Merritronix shares made a strong debut on BSE SME, opening at ₹283.10, 90% above its issue price of ₹149. The IPO attracted massive interest, with a subscription rate of 315.36 times, and the stock hit an upper circuit of ₹297.25.

articles.title: Rupee opens 37 paise lower at 95.32 against US dollar
articles.summary: The Indian rupee fell to 95.32 against the US dollar due to geopolitical tensions, rising oil prices, and a global selloff. RBI measures may attract $30-50 billion in capital inflows, improving outlook, though the currency remains sensitive to oil price movements.

articles.title: Hexagon Nutrition IPO Day 2: Issue subscribed 3.75x so far. Check GMP, issue details, key dates. Apply or not?
articles.summary: The Hexagon Nutrition IPO opened with robust demand, fully subscribed within hours. The public issue runs from June 5-9, 2026. Valued at ₹138.87 crore, it consists of an offer-for-sale of 3.08 crore shares, with brokerages advising a 'Subscribe' rating.

articles.title: The move into gold by other nations has happened before. It’s bad news for US dollar
articles.summary: The recent shift from U.S. assets to gold mirrors 1971, when central banks dumped dollars before President Nixon ended gold convertibility.
